assessment.note: Pivoted from energy to stalled mentoring; stopping pushing is a mild negative engagement signal, and also reveals a growth thread worth following.

new_queue.label: Mentoring stall
new_queue.name: You said mentoring 'stopped pushing' — what made it stall?
new_queue.description: Drills into the stalled mentoring thread to surface whether the block is time, scope, opportunity, or motivation.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Next quarter shape
new_queue.name: What do you expect to own next quarter?
new_queue.description: Surfaces her own mental model of upcoming ownership before new work is introduced.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel lighter or sharper?
new_queue.description: Closes by surfacing the support, focus, or change that would most improve the next stretch.
